inputs.title: Tasks stuck in running state
inputs.description: Sometimes tasks never finish. Probably a daemon bug.

context.failureMode: Investigation ends with unsupported hypothesis and no reproduction.

rubric.criterion: Implementation does not start without reproduction, affected surface, and confidence.
Investigation records attempted repro steps even when inconclusive.

provenance.source: Failure pattern from bugfix tickets advanced without evidence.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized failure mode; no single source task id archived.
